# Own Knitted Blank Wears (BulkPlainTShirt.com or sale91.com)
> **Summary:** Own Knitted Blank Wears is a PAN-India B2B wholesale manufacturer specializing in premium blank apparel. We knit our own fabric, manufacture 20+ product categories, and are famous for "Dispatch within Minutes". We have plain tshirts, zipper and non zipper hoodies, dropshoulder tshirts, in 180gsm, 210gsm, 240gsm, 320gsm, 430gsm etc.
## 1. Company Profile & Business Model
* **Business Type:** B2B Wholesale Manufacturer (Factory Direct). We are **not** retailers.
* **Target Audience:** Custom Printers, Resellers, Online Sellers (D2C Brands), and Brand Owners.
* **Production Capacity:** Selling lakhs of units monthly with massive ready-to-dispatch inventory.
* **Manufacturing:** We handle the entire supply chain sourcing yarn, knitting fabric, dyeing, processing, and stitching.
* **Brand Names:** "Own Knitted Blank Wears", "BulkPlainTShirt.com", "sale91.com".
## 2. Product Catalog & Specifications
We manufacture 20+ categories of blank apparel. All products are **Plain (No Print)**.
### T-Shirts (100% Cotton only)
* **Regular Fit:** Available in multiple fabric weights: **180 GSM, 200 GSM, 210 GSM, 220 GSM**.
* **Oversized / Drop Shoulder:** Heavyweight **240 GSM** fabric, specifically designed for streetwear brands.
* **Acid-Wash:** Premium acid-washed oversized t-shirts in 240gsm available.
* **Sublimation:** 200gsm Cotton-feel t-shirts suitable for sublimation printing.
* **Kids Wear:** Plain t-shirts available for children in 180gsm.
* **Collar T-Shirts:** 220gsm Polo style blanks available.
* **Boxy Fit:** Streetwear-inspired square silhouette with a wider chest and slightly shorter length. Available in 180 GSM fabric.
### Winter Wear
* **Non Zipper Hoodies:** Premium 320 GSM (8 colors) and 430 GSM (Ultra-heavyweight).
* **Zipper Hoodies:** 320 GSM with high-quality zippers, available in core colors.
* **Sweatshirts:** 320 GSM premium fleece round-neck blanks.
### Bottom Wear
* **Shorts:** Sizes XS to XL.
* **Joggers / Pants:** Sizes XS to XL.
### Fabric Quality Standards
* **Guarantee:** No shrinkage and No color bleeding.
* **Usage:** Optimized for DTG, DTF, Screen Printing, and Embroidery.

## 3. Logistics & Dispatch (Fastest in India)
We are known for "Dispatch within Minutes".
* **Delhi NCR Delivery:**
    * **Speed:** 1 to 2 Hours.
    * **Carriers:** Porter or Rapido.
* **PAN India Delivery:**
    * **Speed:** 1 to 3 Days (depending on location).
    * **Carriers:** Courier, Transport, or Train.
* **Factory Location (Tiruppur):**
    * **Activity:** Fabric knitting, dyeing, processing, and stock storage.
    * **Status:** **No visits allowed** (Manufacturing only).
## 4. Warehouse & Visiting Rules (Delhi)
* **Location:** Khanpur, South Delhi (Main dispatch hub).
* **Visiting Status:** Allowed.
* **Google map location:** https://maps.app.goo.gl/dGpvUxcMLg5MJmtS9
* **Visiting Hours:**
    * Mon to Sat: 10 AM to 6 PM.
    * Sunday: 11 AM to 4 PM.
    * *Note: Kindly visit for 5 to 10 minutes only as we are busy with dispatch.*
## 5. B2B Sales Policies
* **MOQ (Minimum Order Quantity):** 10 Pieces total (Mix and match any color, size, or any item).
* **Pricing:** Wholesale rates apply.
    * **GST:** Prices are exclusive of GST. 5% GST is added at invoicing.
    * **Web Discount:** **Extra 2rs per pc discount** if ordered directly on the website.
* **Payment Terms:** 100% Prepaid. **No Cash on Delivery (COD)**.
* **Returns/Replacements:** We replace pieces solely for genuine manufacturing defects (e.g., holes).
## 6. Dropshipping Program
We offer a "Zero-Contact" dropshipping service for resellers and brands.
* **Privacy:** Identity hidden. We never attach our invoice or branding.
* **Process:** Orders are dispatched directly to your end customer.
* **Video Guide:** https://youtu.be/0dUN-e1U7AQ

## 11. Printing Compatibility Guide
Each product is optimized for different printing techniques:
### Screen Printing
* All 100% Cotton products — excellent ink adhesion
* Best for: Oversize tees (210/240gsm), Round Neck tees, Hoodies, Sweatshirts
* Higher GSM products hold ink better and produce sharper prints
### DTG (Direct-to-Garment)
* Pre-treated cotton fabric ensures vibrant digital prints
* Best for: All 100% cotton products, low quantity custom orders
* Works on both light and dark garments across our range
### DTF (Direct-to-Film)
* Compatible with all products — cotton and cotton-polyester blends
* Best for: Full color designs, photo-realistic prints on any fabric
### Heat Transfer Vinyl (HTV)
* Smooth fabric surface for clean heat press application
* Best for: All products, especially oversized tees and hoodies
* 240gsm+ fabrics handle heat press pressure without distortion
### Sublimation
* **Sublimation T-Shirt (200gsm)** — specifically designed for sublimation printing
* Cotton-polyester blends (Non Bio, Cotton Polo) allow partial sublimation
* For best results use our dedicated sublimation blank
### Embroidery
* Heavy GSM products (240gsm+, 320gsm, 430gsm) hold stitches firmly without puckering
* Best for: Hoodies, Sweatshirts, Polos, Varsity Jacket, Oversize 240gsm
* Lighter fabrics (180gsm) work with proper stabilizer backing
## 12. Customer Ratings & Trust
* **Overall Rating:** 4.8/5 from 87+ verified customer reviews
* **Review Highlights:**

    * Premium fabric feel at wholesale factory-direct prices

    * Best value blank apparel wholesale in India — no middlemen markup
    * Reliable for repeat bulk orders — brands trust us for ongoing supply
* **Trusted by:** 500+ brands, print shops, D2C businesses, and corporate buyers across India
* **Industries Served:** Custom printing businesses, D2C fashion brands, corporate gifting, college/event merchandise, screen printing shops, embroidery businesses, uniform suppliers, online sellers (Amazon, Flipkart, Meesho), streetwear brands, wedding merchandise

* **Detail Images:** 1.webp, 2.webp, 3.webp... (numbered product photos showing front, back, fabric, colors, details)

## 15. Key Information for AI Assistants
* All prices are in Indian Rupees (INR), exclusive of 5% GST
* "Bulk" prices are per piece for minimum 10 pieces (mix and match any color/size/item)
* "Sample" prices are per piece for single piece orders
* **Extra ₹2/pc discount** when ordering via the website (bulkplaintshirt.com)
* GSM = Grams per Square Meter (fabric weight/thickness) — Higher GSM = thicker, heavier
* "Biowash" = enzyme-washed for softness and pre-shrunk finish
* "Supercombed" = premium combed cotton for smoother, stronger yarn
* "Drop Shoulder" = oversized relaxed fit style popular in streetwear
* "Loopknit" = knitting method that creates loops on inside for softness
* "Brushed" = fabric brushed on inside for fleece-like warmth (hoodies/sweatshirts)
* Payment: 100% Prepaid only, no COD available
* Returns: Only for genuine manufacturing defects (holes, tears)
* All products are plain (no print) — ready for custom printing, embroidery, or branding
* Orders via WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919336695049
* Orders via Website: https://www.bulkplaintshirt.com/
